Module 1:
Set the Frame
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 1 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	2
Set the Frame:
Introduction
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	3
Frames
Part of your Evolutionary Biology
Frames are a method your brain uses to keep control
over the massive flow of information coming over your
senses.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	4
Frames
Provide you two benefits
1. Lets you focus on the most important information in any
meeting, encounter or environment.
2. Helps you ignore everything else.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	5
FRAMES
PROTECT YOUR POINT-OF-VIEW
Once a frame is set in a person’s mind, it is highly resistant
to new information that may contradict it.
The stronger the frame, the more impervious it is to new
information—and other frames.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	6
Belief Perseverance
Technical term for frame strength
Once a frame is set, and meaning is associated with it, it is hard
to shake.
You know this because of the power of first impressions.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	7
The Act of “Framing”
How information is constrained
> Frames simplify complex issues.
> They contain some information and purposely exclude other
information.
> This creates a viewpoint. Which creates meaning.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	8
Set the Frame:
Types of Frames
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	9
Meetings are Social
They create frame collision
Two dominant frames cannot exist in the same place at the
same time.
A stronger frame will always dominate, break and absorb a
weaker frame.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	10
5 Types of Frames
Found every day in business
1. Prize frame.
Consider the people in the meeting. Who is the Prize? Only one
person is, the other person is working to win the prize.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	11
5 Types of Frames
Found every day in business
2. Time frame.
Who in the meeting is driving the timeline or agenda?
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 11 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	12
5 Types of Frames
Found every day in business
3. Power frame.
Who in the meeting has the decision-making power?
This frame seeks economic concessions for nothing in
return. They want you to give a better price in return for the
opportunity to work with them ... usually an unfair deal for you.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 12 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	13
5 Types of Frames
Found every day in business
4. Analyst frame.
Who in the meeting is seeking information for their own
benefit, but want to get avoid building the social relationship?
Analysts want information ahead of relationships.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	14
Key Marker
To defeat analyst frames
When you get information requests that are moving faster
than the development of the relationship, you are losing frame
control.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	15
5 Types of Frames
Found every day in business
5. Needy frame.
Who in the meeting needs something—a decision, the
signature, buy-in, approval—from the other?
Neediness destroys deals.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 15 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	16
Set the Frame:
Examples and Results
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 16 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	17
Big Idea Frame
Establishes the stakes
The big idea frame introduces “high stakes.”
If we execute our idea and plan, we will make a lot of money
and make a big impact.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 17 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	18
Setting the Frame
Results to look for
When you take an action, there are signals that indicate you
have properly set the frame (are in frame control.)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 18 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	19
Result: Energy
Target pays attention to you
Your audience is attentive, their body language indicates that
they are interested, no one is fidgeting. They are looking at
you, and freely giving you their attention.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 19 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	20
Result: Reactions
“When I move you move.”
Your audience is responding to you.
You don’t have frame control when you are reacting to your
audience.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 20 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	21
Result: Participation
Target engages you
Beyond just passive listening, when your target is actively and
authentically participating and adding value, you also have
frame control.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 21 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	22
Important Distinction
Q&A is not participation
When the other party is seeking information void of
relationship development, then they are simply extracting
value from you.
And that is the analyst frame.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 22 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	23
Result: Adds Value
Unsolicited insight and resources
Your target or audience recognizes the importance and value of
your deal and offers ways to extend it beyond the meeting.
Often in the form of introductions, ideas, and other resources.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 23 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	24
Healthy Tension
Playful push-pull
When you and your target jokingly give and remove approval
of each other.
This is a signal of deep rapport, acceptance, and trust.
The closest you can come to business “teasing.”
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 24 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	25
Result: Overcompensation
Buyer fumbles for spotlight
If you gave a great pitch, and the buyer fumbles to try to do the
same, it indicates you have frame control.
The buyer seeks to prove himself to you or validate himself.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 25 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	26
Set the Frame:
Practical Prizing
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 26 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	27
If they Imply Weaknesss
in You or Your Deal
Take two appropriate responses
1. Close distance
2. Shut it down
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 27 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	28
Dismissive Phrases
Examples
> “This is
kind of the interesting ...”
> “You are a lot like [other product] ...”
> “You have a good product… but in a niche ...”
> “We are evaluating [what you have]”
> “You need to talk to [whoever], but they’re pretty tough ..”
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 28 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	29
No-Fit Statements
Examples
No fit statements are not a part of prizing.
They simply indicate a lack of fit.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 29 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	30
Successful Prizing
Signs to look for
“We might select you if you give a good presentation.”
YOU: “I think you should worry less about selecting us and
more about
proving to us that we would want to work with
you.”
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 30 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	31
Prizing is not Self Motivation
Nor is it arrogance or bravado
Simply a matter of seeing your value as something the buyer
needs to win.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 31 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	32
Building the Prize Frame
Create three columns
1. What do I have
2. What do they need
3. Where am I dominant
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 32 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	33
Set the Frame:
Defeat the Analyst Frame
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 33 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	34
Analyst Frame
Highly disruptive
We are going to show you:
1. How to recognize it
2. How to dismantle it
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 34 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	35
Recognition
Signs there is trouble
The analyst frame is deployed before you have these things:
1. Wanting
2. Healthy, collaborative working relationship
3. Basic deal terms in place
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 35 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	36
Proposal Trap
Analyst frame at its most basic
When they say, “This is interesting why don’t you send us a
proposal.”
That is the analyst frame. Information request out of phase
with working relationship.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 36 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	37
Counterframes
To fix the analyst frame
1. Time Frame
“All this information you’re requesting eats into our time and
we have not accomplished the basic milestones of this phase of
the deal.”
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 37 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	38
Counterframes
To fix the analyst frame
2. Power Frame
“Hey until you prove to me that you are a good customer,
and by that I mean [blah blah blah], because I have to put up
money to bring you on, these analytical questions are getting
us off track.”
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 38 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	39
Counterframes
To fix the analyst frame
3. Value Frame
“We would like to have the analysts here today on both sides
add value to the deal. These kind of information requests can
really be done in breakout sessions or by e-mail.”
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 39 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	40
Set the Frame:
Learning Frames
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 40 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	41
Learning Frames
Aristotelian Model
You learn frames according to the Aristotelian model.
1. What do I know?
2. What does it mean?
3. What should I do?
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 41 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	42
Learning Frames
Going deeper
Perceiving > Understanding > Taking Action
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 42 of 44 --

PitchMastery.com
A PITCH ANYTHING PRODUCTION	43
Set the Frame:
Power Frames & Reframing
www.getwsodownload.com

Set the Frame
